name: Strawberry-Banana Shake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu silken soft tofu (10.5 oz), drained
1 cup frozen strawberries, sweetened with juice and slightly thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture.
4. Serve 3 servings of approximately 6 oz each.
